core_passive.name: Spiritual Alignment
core_passive.description: Directional or energy-linked items gain extra effectiveness when their setup is cleanly completed.
core_passive.effect_summary: Rewards precise arrangement and complete support structure.

unlock_branch.name: Talisman Harmony
unlock_branch.description: Talisman support items provide more value to valid adjacent targets.

unlock_branch.name: Spirit Stone Conduction
unlock_branch.description: Spirit stone energy providers lose less efficiency across linked paths.

unlock_branch.name: Weapon Facing Insight
unlock_branch.description: Correctly oriented weapon items gain clearer payoff.

core_passive.name: Charged Casting
core_passive.description: Spell-form items gain extra payoff when triggered after proper magical setup.
core_passive.effect_summary: Rewards magical sequencing and prepared bursts.

unlock_branch.name: Quick Sigil
unlock_branch.description: The first magical support item each battle becomes active more reliably.

unlock_branch.name: Stored Charge
unlock_branch.description: Charged spell items retain more prepared value.

unlock_branch.name: Arcane Echo
unlock_branch.description: One spell trigger each battle gains a lighter repeat effect under valid conditions.

core_passive.name: Predictive Routine
core_passive.description: Structured linked systems perform more consistently when all activation dependencies are met.
core_passive.effect_summary: Rewards complete routing and clean machine logic.

unlock_branch.name: Efficient Processing
unlock_branch.description: Linked support or logic items consume less operational efficiency.

unlock_branch.name: Redundant Safeguard
unlock_branch.description: Once per battle, one failed structured activation can be partially recovered.

unlock_branch.name: Optimization Cycle
unlock_branch.description: Stable linked builds gain a small end-of-cycle efficiency bonus.
